data.title: After the Bybit hack, Binance had a 24-hour net inflow of $1.046 billion, and Bybit had a 24-hour net outflow of $2.675 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Defillama data, after the Bybit hacking incident, CEXs saw divergent capital flows. Binance had a 24-hour net inflow of $1.046 billion, making it the exchange with the most inflows; at the same time, Bybit had a 24-hour net outflow of $2.675 billion, and OKX, Bitfinex and Robinhood had net outflows of $7.35 million, $188 million and $39.95 million, respectively.

data.title: Ethena Labs founder: Ethena handled the largest single-day redemption without any losses or redemption issues
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Ethena Labs founder @leptokurtic_ posted on the X platform: "Ethena handled the largest single-day redemption and closed all unrealized risk exposure as soon as the news broke. In any case, at its peak, the unrealized risk exposure was always only a small part of USDe's excess reserves. Although Bybit, the world's second largest derivatives exchange, represents more than 20% of risk aversion exposure, USDe has never underestimated the deposit. Even if the unrealized risk exposure does not drop to zero within the hour, this exposure may be completely lost, and USDe will still be overcollateralized. I hope this incident can verify some of the design decisions made to reduce the risks of users using the OES custody solution. The simple design route is to avoid costs and the engineering complexity added by custodians in the off-chain hedging system. Ethena Labs has not encountered any support losses or redemption request issues."

data.title: Ethena Labs Addresses Major Redemption and Risk Exposure
data.description: According to Odaily, Ethena Labs founder @leptokurtic_ announced on the X platform that the company successfully managed its largest single-day redemption and promptly closed all unrealized risk exposures following recent news. Despite Bybit, the world's second-largest derivatives exchange, accounting for over 20% of the hedging exposure, USDe has never faced under-collateralization issues. Even if the unrealized risk exposure did not drop to zero within hours, it could be entirely lost while USDe would remain over-collateralized. The founder expressed hope that this incident would validate some design decisions made to reduce user risk when using OES custody solutions. Ethena Labs has not encountered any issues with support losses or redemption requests.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Short Squeeze Amid Bybit Theft Concerns
data.description: According to Odaily, Zhu Su recently commented on platform X that numerous traders have opened short positions on Ethereum (ETH) due to panic over the theft of ETH assets on Bybit. This situation has now led to a narrative where ETH could potentially reach a new all-time high as a result of a short squeeze.

data.title: Bybit’s total assets exceed $19.5 billion, and it still holds more than 450,000 ETH, worth $1.2 billion
Wall Street Journal: CertiK confirms Bybit incident as the largest theft in crypto history
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Wall Street Journal quoted the Web3.0 security agency CertiK as saying that the Bybit theft was the largest single theft in the history of encryption, and the stolen assets caused by this hacker attack were valued at more than $1.4 billion.
After the incident, Bybit announced that it had reported the case to the relevant authorities. Its CEO Ben Zhou said that all Bybit functions and products are still operating normally, the exchange has solvency, and will fully bear customer losses. So far, all Bybit withdrawal requests have been processed, and the withdrawal system has returned to normal speed.

data.title: Bybit CEO Discusses Stress Levels After Hack
data.description: According to Odaily, Bybit co-founder and CEO Ben Zhou shared insights on the X platform regarding his stress levels following a recent hack. Zhou mentioned that during an early morning online broadcast, viewers noticed him wearing a WHOOP watch and inquired about his stress monitoring results. He revealed that he had barely slept but felt surprisingly well, attributing his focus on handling numerous meetings as a distraction from stress relief. Zhou noted that he became aware of the $1.5 billion loss due to the hack around 10 p.m. and anticipates the full impact of the loss will soon become apparent.

data.title: SlowMist Yusin: Safe’s front-end was tampered with and caused problems, Bybit is not an isolated case
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Slow Mist Yuxian posted on the X platform, "There is no problem with the Safe contract, the problem lies in the non-contract part, the front end was tampered with and forged to achieve a deceptive effect. This is not an isolated case. North Korean hackers took over several companies last year, such as: WazirX 230 million US dollars Safe multi-signature; Radiant Capital 50 million US dollars-Safe multi-signature; DMM 305 million US dollars-Gonco multi-signature. This attack method is mature and engineered. Other companies also need to pay more attention, and multi-signature may not only have this type of attack point in Safe."

data.title: Zhu Su: Affected by the panic of Bybit theft, ETH ushered in a narrative of a record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Zhu Su posted on the X platform that a large number of traders opened short orders under the panic of Bybit ETH assets being stolen, and now ETH finally has a narrative of setting a new record high (i.e. short squeeze).

data.title: AscendEX will soon list cockcoin_ada (COCK)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch cockcoin_ada (COCK) at 19:00 on February 22, opening the COCK/USDT trading pair, and recharge is now open.
AscendEX (formerly BitMax) is one of the leading and comprehensive trading platforms for Memecoin in the entire network. The Meme Research Institute team under the platform selects high-quality Memes for listing based on on-chain data and project background.
